issues.title: Setup React TypeScript project structure
issues.description: Initialize a React TypeScript project with Vite for the power distribution payment system frontend. Include proper folder structure for components, pages, services, and utilities.

issues.title: Install Stellar SDK for blockchain integration
issues.description: Install and configure Stellar SDK for interacting with the Stellar blockchain network for payment processing.

issues.title: Configure routing with React Router
issues.description: Set up React Router for navigation between different pages of the power distribution system (dashboard, payments, billing, etc.).

issues.title: Create responsive layout with sidebar navigation
issues.description: Design and implement a responsive layout with sidebar navigation for the power distribution management interface.

issues.title: Implement user authentication system
issues.description: Create authentication system for users to log in and manage their power distribution accounts using Stellar wallet integration.

issues.title: Build dashboard overview page
issues.description: Create main dashboard showing power consumption metrics, payment history, and account balance overview.

issues.title: Implement Stellar wallet connection
issues.description: Create wallet connection interface allowing users to connect their Stellar wallets for payment processing.

issues.title: Create payment processing component
issues.description: Build payment processing interface for handling power bill payments through Stellar blockchain.

issues.title: Implement transaction history page
issues.description: Create page to display all payment transactions with details like amount, date, status, and Stellar transaction hash.

issues.title: Build customer management interface
issues.description: Create interface for managing customer accounts, including registration, profile management, and account status.

issues.title: Implement power consumption tracking
issues.description: Create system to track and display power consumption data with charts and analytics.

issues.title: Create billing plan management
issues.description: Build interface for creating and managing different billing plans for power distribution services.

issues.title: Implement automated payment scheduling
issues.description: Create system for scheduling recurring payments for power bills using Stellar smart contracts.

issues.title: Build notification system
issues.description: Implement notification system for payment reminders, transaction confirmations, and account alerts.

issues.title: Create admin dashboard
issues.description: Build admin dashboard for system administrators to monitor overall system health and manage all users.

issues.title: Implement API client for backend integration
issues.description: Create API client service to communicate with backend services for data persistence and business logic.

issues.title: Add form validation with error handling
issues.description: Implement comprehensive form validation and error handling for all user input forms.

issues.title: Create loading states and spinners
issues.description: Implement loading states and spinner components for better user experience during async operations.

issues.title: Implement error boundaries
issues.description: Add React error boundaries to gracefully handle and display errors throughout the application.

issues.title: Add dark mode support
issues.description: Implement dark mode toggle and ensure all components support both light and dark themes.

issues.title: Create responsive mobile design
issues.description: Ensure the entire application is fully responsive and works seamlessly on mobile devices.

issues.title: Implement data persistence with localStorage
issues.description: Add localStorage integration for persisting user preferences and session data.

issues.title: Build export functionality for reports
issues.description: Create functionality to export transaction history and consumption data to CSV/PDF formats.

issues.title: Implement real-time updates with WebSocket
issues.description: Add WebSocket integration for real-time updates on transaction status and power consumption.

issues.title: Create comprehensive unit tests
issues.description: Write unit tests for all components, services, and utility functions using Jest and React Testing Library.

issues.title: Add end-to-end testing with Cypress
issues.description: Implement E2E tests for critical user flows like payment processing and authentication.

issues.title: Implement rate limiting for API calls
issues.description: Add rate limiting to prevent abuse of API endpoints and ensure fair usage.

issues.title: Create audit logging system
issues.description: Implement comprehensive audit logging for all user actions and system events.

issues.title: Build customer support chat interface
issues.description: Create integrated customer support chat for users to get help with payments and account issues.

issues.title: Implement multi-language support (i18n)
issues.description: Add internationalization support for multiple languages in the power distribution system.

issues.title: Create advanced search and filtering
issues.description: Implement advanced search and filtering capabilities for transactions, customers, and reports.

issues.title: Build analytics dashboard with charts
issues.description: Create comprehensive analytics dashboard with various charts showing power usage trends and payment patterns.

issues.title: Implement backup and restore functionality
issues.description: Add functionality for users to backup and restore their account data and settings.

issues.title: Create API documentation with Swagger
issues.description: Generate comprehensive API documentation for frontend-backend integration.

issues.title: Implement progressive web app features
issues.description: Convert the application to a PWA with offline capabilities and app-like experience.

issues.title: Add performance monitoring
issues.description: Implement performance monitoring to track application speed and user experience metrics.

issues.title: Create role-based access control
issues.description: Implement RBAC system with different permission levels for admins, operators, and customers.

issues.title: Build payment reconciliation system
issues.description: Create system to reconcile payments between Stellar blockchain and internal billing records.

issues.title: Implement smart contract interaction
issues.description: Add functionality to interact with Stellar smart contracts for automated payment processing.

issues.title: Create customer onboarding flow
issues.description: Design and implement step-by-step onboarding flow for new customers joining the power distribution system.

issues.title: Build invoice generation system
issues.description: Create automated invoice generation for power bills with customizable templates.

issues.description: Create interactive visualizations showing power grid status and distribution patterns.

issues.title: Create automated testing pipeline
issues.description: Set up CI/CD pipeline with automated testing for continuous integration and deployment.

issues.title: Implement caching strategy
